jp.title: 「田鎖ブラザーズ」切りつけられた少女の正体判明 病室のネームプレートに注目集まる「一致した」「まだ何か隠してそう」

jp.title: 『ソニックレーシング クロスワールド』PS5・Steam版が40%オフで買えるセールが開催。Steamで製品版を無料体験できるイベントが5月1日より実施
jp.description: 『ソニックレーシング クロスワールド』を40%オフで購入できるセールがPlayStation Store、PC（Steam）にて開催。期間はPS Storeでは2026年5月6日（水）まで、PC（Steam）では5月8日（金）まで。さらに、5月1日（金）から5月5日（火）まで期間限定で、PC（Steam）にて製品版を無料でプレイできるフリープレイイベントが実施。

jp.title: 【中日】首位ヤクルトに今季初の逆転サヨナラ勝ち！連敗6で止める 9回村松が1号劇的逆転3ラン！杉浦移籍後初勝利 ボスラー1号＆2打点
jp.description:
■プロ野球　中日 6×－4 ヤクルト　（24日　バンテリンドーム）
中日はヤクルトとの本拠地3連戦初戦を今季初の逆転サヨナラ勝ち。連敗を「6」で止め、5勝17敗の借金12に減らした。
試合は3－

jp.title: “丼もの”に明暗 ダブルパンチで「親子丼」ショック 卵と鶏肉が高騰…一方、ウナギ豊漁で「うな丼」は値下げ
jp.description:
ぐつぐつ煮える鍋の中で、だしと溶き卵が絡み合い仕上げの工程に入っていたのは、東京・渋谷の鶏料理店「はし田屋」の看板メニュー「名物 親子丼」です。
アツアツの湯気が立ち上る親子丼の上に、黄金に輝く卵

world.title: Tanzania Plans Constitutional Reform After Post
world.description: After 2025 post-election unrest, Tanzania's President Samia Suluhu Hassan vows constitutional reform, a reconciliation body, and probes into 518 deaths and missing people.

world.title: New Final Fantasy XIV Expansion Called Evercold
world.description: The new Final Fantasy XIV expansion Evercold appeared for the first time at FFXIV Fan Fest 2026, and it'll appear in 2027.

world.title: The Sound of My Father: A story of love, loss and connection
world.description:
When a long-lost cassette was discovered in a bag of letters, it sparked a journey of discovery for John Court.
His story is being told in the new RNZ podcast The Sound of My Father.

world.title: Black Stars squad: Amoako Jr, Beres Owusu, Opoku in line for Mexico friendly
world.description: As Ghana’s senior national team prepares for the FIFA World Cup, head coach Carlos Queiroz is expected to hand opportunities to a number of emerging talents during the upcoming international friendly against Mexico.

world.title: Ashok Lahiri, Bengal BJP MLA and ex-CEA, to become Niti Aayog vice-chairman
world.description: A member of the current Bengal assembly from Balurghat — but not contesting the ongoing elections — Lahiri has served as the 12th Chief Economic Adviser| India News

world.title: Christchurch's new Te Kaha stadium completed without major incident - WorkSafe
world.description: Christchurch's new venue hosted its first event on Friday, when the Crusaders beat NSW Waratahs in Super Rugby Pacific.

world.title: Scientists Finally Identify Mysterious Golden Orb Found on Seafloor
world.description: Scientists have finally solved a deep-sea mystery that has been unsolved for years: what the hell was that golden orb NOAA found on the sea floor in Alaska?

world.title: Football news: Slot blames ‘crazy schedule’ for Alisson absence; Livramento blow for Howe
world.description: Liverpool’s troubled goalkeeping situation in spotlight as Newcastle manager fears for fitness of his England defender

world.title: Lacrosse Travels to VCU for Season Finale
world.description: Richmond, Va. -- George Mason women's lacrosse heads on the road for the final match of the season against VCU in Richmond, Va., on Saturday, April 25th  at 1 p.m.

world.title: SDLP defends councillors under fire for abstaining in Bobby Sands statue vote
world.description: The party says its council amendment would have resolved matter and ‘issue would be closed’
